concepts.title: Carbylamine Reaction
concepts.conceptBody:
Carbylamine Reaction: This is a chemical test for the detection of primary amines. Both aliphatic and aromatic primary amines when heated with chloroform and ethanolic $\text{KOH}$ form isocyanide, also called carbylamine, a foul smelling compound.

Mechanism:
